signals.headline: Ceasefire Talks Collapse: US-Iran Negotiations in Islamabad End Without Progress on April 12 | NO** | **MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ceasefire Talks Collapse: US-Iran Negotiations in Islamabad End Without Progress on April 12 | NO** | **MED confidence** [2][3]

The two-week ceasefire, agreed on April 8 and mediated by Pakistan, remains fragile on day five (April 12), with US negotiators including VP JD Vance leaving Islamabad after Iran rejected a "take it or leave it" US proposal demanding an end to its nuclear program[2][3].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

Thunder Key Players Ruled Out for Regular Season Finale vs. Suns (135-103 Loss), Expected Back for Playoffs | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

Suns reserves dominated a shorthanded Thunder team in their meaningless regular-season finale on April 12, with 10 players listed out, including **Shai Gilgeous-Alexander** (oblique), **Jalen Williams** (hamstring), and **Jaylin Williams** (Achilles tendinitis);

signals.headline: NM Supreme Court Confirms Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Duke Rodriguez's Ballot Eligibility** | YES | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
NM Supreme Court Confirms Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Duke Rodriguez's Ballot Eligibility** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

The New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously ruled that Duke Rodriguez, a Republican candidate for governor in the 2026 race, can appear on the June primary ballot, upholding a lower court's dismissal of an eligibility challenge[1]. This resolution addresses residency concerns
